name: pre-arxiv
description: PreXiv — a research manuscript archive with explicit AI-use provenance, hosted artifacts, version history, and optional human audit statements

scripts.reset: rm -f data/prearxiv.db data/prearxiv.db-shm data/prearxiv.db-wal data/prearxiv.seed.db data/sessions.db data/sessions.db-shm data/sessions.db-wal && node seed.js
scripts.test:all: python3 tests/prexiv_api_test.py & python3 tests/prexiv_mcp_test.py & python3 tests/prexiv_safety_test.py & wait
